description: Deterministic concept rules mapping explicit GAUGE states to business concepts. Each concept requires one or more input fields and a specific predicate condition. No concept is implicit or inferred.

concepts.label: Full system visibility
concepts.business_concept: All identifiable system components are structurally mapped.

concepts.label: Partial system visibility
concepts.business_concept: A portion of expected system components are structurally mapped.

concepts.label: Structural integrity confirmed
concepts.business_concept: Structural relationships are consistent across all mapped system components.

concepts.label: No unmapped elements
concepts.business_concept: No elements fall outside the defined structural boundary.

concepts.label: Unmapped elements present
concepts.business_concept: One or more elements fall outside the defined structural boundary.

concepts.label: Execution assessment not performed
concepts.business_concept: Runtime behavior has not yet been validated. Execution assessment is a separate evaluation that has not been performed.

concepts.label: No operational escalation conditions
concepts.business_concept: No operational escalation conditions are present in the structural layer.

concepts.label: Cross-domain dependencies present
concepts.business_concept: One or more system components span multiple structural domains.

concepts.label: No cross-domain dependencies
concepts.business_concept: All system components are contained within a single structural domain.

concepts.label: Behavioral signals bound
concepts.business_concept: Behavioral data signals are bound to structural nodes in this model.

concepts.label: No behavioral signals bound
concepts.business_concept: No behavioral data signals are bound to this structural model.

concepts.label: Score is conditional
concepts.business_concept: The proven structural score represents the established floor. The achievable score depends on the execution layer completing.

concepts.label: Source data intake complete
concepts.business_concept: All expected source data boundaries have been received and accepted.

concepts.label: Structural patterns conform
concepts.business_concept: Observed structural patterns conform to the expected standards for this system type.

concepts.label: Confidence range computed
concepts.business_concept: The score confidence range has been computed. The proven lower bound and achievable upper bound are both defined.

concepts.label: Structural model has isolated elements
concepts.business_concept: One or more structural nodes have no containment relationship in the current model.

concepts.label: Structural topology is multi-domain
concepts.business_concept: The system structural model spans multiple structural domains.

concepts.label: Structural integrity check failed
concepts.business_concept: Structural relationships are not consistent. One or more reconstruction validation axes have not passed.

concepts.label: Unknown space present in structural topology
concepts.business_concept: One or more records in the structural topology fall outside the classified boundary.

deferred_concepts.label: Reconstruction failure by axis
deferred_concepts.deferred_reason: Requires reconstruction_state.json axis_results field mapping — deferred to a subsequent stream

deferred_concepts.label: Projected score caveat
deferred_concepts.deferred_reason: projection.caveat is free-form text — requires controlled extraction before business mapping

deferred_concepts.label: Execution phase progression
deferred_concepts.deferred_reason: PHASE_1_ACTIVE is the only attested state in current artifacts — multi-phase state mapping deferred
